requirement_topic.en: Cell & System Safety Certification — AS IEC 62619:2023 & EESS
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯及系统安全认证 — AS IEC 62619:2023 及 EESS
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯及系統安全認證 — AS IEC 62619:2023 及 EESS

summary.en: Battery cells and battery systems placed on the Australian market must comply with IEC 62619 as adopted by Standards Australia as AS IEC 62619:2023 (Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications). The battery system installation must additionally comply with AS/NZS 5139:2019 (Electrical Installations — Safety of Battery Systems for Use with Power Conversion Equipment). Electrical equipment, including BESS components, must carry the RCM (Regulatory Compliance Mark) and be registered in the EESS (Electrical Equipment Safety System) database under the applicable product level (Level 2 or Level 3 depending on risk classification). Testing for EESS registration must be carried out at an ILAC MRA-accredited laboratory acceptable to the applicable Australian regulatory authority.
summary.zh: 在澳大利亚市场销售的电池单体及电池系统须符合 IEC 62619（已被标准澳大利亚采纳为 AS IEC 62619:2023，工业应用二次锂电池及电池组安全要求）。电池系统安装还须符合 AS/NZS 5139:2019（电气装置——与电力转换设备配套使用的蓄电池系统安全）。包括 BESS 组件在内的电气设备须贴有 RCM（合规性标志），并依据适用产品等级（按风险等级分为 2 级或 3 级）在 EESS（电气设备安全系统）数据库中完成注册。EESS 注册所需测试须在符合适用澳大利亚监管机构要求的 ILAC MRA 认可实验室进行。
summary.zht: 在澳洲市場銷售的電池單體及電池系統須符合 IEC 62619（已被標準澳洲採納為 AS IEC 62619:2023，工業應用二次鋰電池及電池組安全要求）。電池系統安裝還須符合 AS/NZS 5139:2019（電氣裝置——與電力轉換設備配套使用的蓄電池系統安全）。包括 BESS 組件在內的電氣設備須貼有 RCM（合規性標誌），並依據適用產品等級（按風險等級分為 2 級或 3 級）在 EESS（電氣設備安全系統）資料庫中完成註冊。EESS 註冊所需測試須在符合適用澳洲監管機構要求的 ILAC MRA 認可實驗室進行。

standards_or_laws: AS IEC 62619:2023 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications (Australian adoption of IEC 62619:2022)
AS/NZS 5139:2019 — Electrical Installations — Safety of Battery Systems for Use with Power Conversion Equipment
Electrical Equipment Safety System (EESS) — administered by state/territory electrical safety regulators
RCM (Regulatory Compliance Mark) — mandatory for in-scope electrical/electronic equipment

summary.en: China requires lithium-based stationary storage batteries to comply with GB 38031-2020 (Safety Requirements for Traction Battery of Electric Vehicle — commonly cited for BESS cells although primarily scoped to EV traction batteries) and GB 36276-2023 (Safety Requirements for Lithium-Ion Battery for Electrical Energy Storage — the dedicated stationary storage standard). These national standards are assessed by CQC or other CNAS-accredited labs and result in CCC certification. CCC and GB test reports are not accepted as substitutes for EESS registration or AS IEC 62619:2023 ILAC-lab test reports by Australian regulators.
summary.zh: 中国要求固定式锂电储能电池符合 GB 38031-2020（电动汽车用动力蓄电池安全要求——常被引用于 BESS 电芯，但主要适用于电动汽车牵引电池）及 GB 36276-2023（电力储能用锂离子蓄电池安全要求——专用固定储能标准）。相关认证由 CQC 或其他 CNAS 认可实验室评定，取得 CCC 认证。CCC 及 GB 检测报告不被澳大利亚监管机构接受为 EESS 注册或 AS IEC 62619:2023 ILAC 实验室检测报告的替代依据。
summary.zht: 中國要求固定式鋰電儲能電池符合 GB 38031-2020（電動汽車用動力蓄電池安全要求——常被引用於 BESS 電芯，但主要適用於電動汽車牽引電池）及 GB 36276-2023（電力儲能用鋰離子蓄電池安全要求——專用固定儲能標準）。相關認證由 CQC 或其他 CNAS 認可實驗室評定，取得 CCC 認證。CCC 及 GB 檢測報告不被澳洲監管機構接受為 EESS 註冊或 AS IEC 62619:2023 ILAC 實驗室檢測報告的替代依據。

standards_or_laws: GB 38031-2020 — 电动汽车用动力蓄电池安全要求 (Safety Requirements for Traction Battery of Electric Vehicle)
GB 36276-2023 — 电力储能用锂离子蓄电池 (Safety requirements for lithium-ion battery for electrical energy storage)
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — mandatory mark for domestic CN market

gap.en: AS IEC 62619:2023 testing must be conducted at an ILAC MRA-accredited laboratory acceptable to the relevant Australian state or territory electrical safety regulator. GB 38031 covers EV traction batteries and is not directly equivalent to the stationary-storage scope of AS IEC 62619:2023. GB 36276 is closer in scope but is not an AS-titled standard and reports from Chinese CNAS labs are not automatically accepted without ILAC MRA mutual recognition confirmation. No mutual recognition agreement exists between CCC and RCM. The exporter must appoint an Australian Responsible Supplier, obtain EESS product registration, and ensure test reports reference the AS standard titles.
gap.zh: AS IEC 62619:2023 测试须在符合相关澳大利亚州或领地电气安全监管机构要求的 ILAC MRA 认可实验室进行。GB 38031 适用于电动汽车牵引电池，与 AS IEC 62619:2023 的固定储能适用范围不直接等同。GB 36276 适用范围更为接近，但并非 AS 标题标准，来自中国 CNAS 实验室的测试报告在未经 ILAC MRA 互认确认的情况下不被自动接受。CCC 与 RCM 之间不存在互认协议。出口商须在澳大利亚指定责任供应商、完成 EESS 产品注册，并确保测试报告引用 AS 标准名称。
gap.zht: AS IEC 62619:2023 測試須在符合相關澳洲州或領地電氣安全監管機構要求的 ILAC MRA 認可實驗室進行。GB 38031 適用於電動汽車牽引電池，與 AS IEC 62619:2023 的固定儲能適用範圍不直接等同。GB 36276 適用範圍更為接近，但並非 AS 標題標準，來自中國 CNAS 實驗室的測試報告在未經 ILAC MRA 互認確認的情況下不被自動接受。CCC 與 RCM 之間不存在互認協議。出口商須在澳洲指定責任供應商、完成 EESS 產品註冊，並確保測試報告引用 AS 標準名稱。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — AS IEC 62619:2023 testing required for EESS registration; AS/NZS 5139:2019 mandatory for installation; RCM mandatory for in-scope electrical equipment placed on the AU market
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic CN market — GB 36276 mandatory safety standard; CCC required for products in applicable CCC catalogue

source.publisher: Electrical Equipment Safety System (EESS) — administered by state/territory electrical safety regulators

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A BESS product certified only to Chinese GB standards cannot be placed on the Australian market without obtaining EESS registration and RCM mark supported by AS IEC 62619:2023 test reports from an ILAC MRA-accredited laboratory. CCC certificates are not accepted as equivalents by Australian regulators.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅取得中国 GB 标准认证的 BESS 产品，在未凭借 ILAC MRA 认可实验室出具的 AS IEC 62619:2023 测试报告取得 EESS 注册及 RCM 标志的情况下，不得在澳大利亚市场销售。CCC 证书不被澳大利亚监管机构接受为等效依据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅取得中國 GB 標準認證的 BESS 產品，在未憑借 ILAC MRA 認可實驗室出具的 AS IEC 62619:2023 測試報告取得 EESS 註冊及 RCM 標誌的情況下，不得在澳洲市場銷售。CCC 證書不被澳洲監管機構接受為等效依據。
